source_basis: line-of-sight warp begins near 1.2 arcmin / 10 kpc and is about a quarter of the other warp component
reason: This source fact defines the mixed warp/vertical-overlay readout window and projection context; it does not provide independent clock/readout evidence.

source_basis: total warp oriented approximately 70 degrees from the line of sight
reason: Orientation supports the observer/path side of the mixed kernel; near/far degeneracy prevents using it as a second amplitude or clock channel.

source_basis: 1C scale height 7 arcsec/500 pc; W model 5 arcsec/350 pc; WF final central scale height 3 arcsec/210 pc
reason: The H I flare/scale-height evidence supports vertical-overlay morphology and projection; it cannot also be counted as independent Xi_t evidence.

source_basis: lag shallows from -35 km/s/kpc at 1.4 arcmin / 5.8 kpc to zero near R25 / 11.2 kpc
reason: The lag is source-side kinematic structure for the vertical-overlay route; it is not treated as a time-readout factor without independent clock evidence.

source_basis: extra flattened component z_EC about 3 kpc; about 20-26 percent of disk mass
reason: The extended stellar component cross-checks the vertical-overlay interpretation but is not summed as an independent second vertical amplitude over the H I flare evidence.

source_basis: regular disk carrier retained for expdisk+WVO frozen protocol reference
reason: The exponential carrier can define a prospective protocol shell but does not retroactively validate the existing expdisk+WVO score.
